articles.title: Massive breach spills credentials for thousands of sensitive networks
articles.content: The affected include Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, a NATO contractor, and Fortinet.
articles.titleZh: 大规模泄露泄露了数千个敏感网络的凭据
articles.contentZh: 受影响的公司包括甲骨文、联想、北约承包商FedEx和Fortinet。

articles.title: Tesco moving 40,000 server workloads off VMware amid Broadcom's “abusive conduct”
articles.content: Tesco claimed Broadcom hiked its VMware prices by about 175 percent in UK court filings.
articles.titleZh: 在Broadcom的“滥用行为”中， Tesco将40,000个服务器工作负载从VMware中移除
articles.contentZh: Tesco声称， Broadcom在英国法院文件中将其VMware价格提高了约175%。

articles.title: "Dangerous" AI models are coming no matter what
articles.content: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.
articles.titleZh: “危险”的人工智能模型无论如何都会出现
articles.contentZh: 具有先进黑客能力的人工智能模型将很快成为常态。

articles.title: Windows and Linux users: The deadline to update Secure Boot keys is near
articles.content: What you need to know about the expiration of keys securing your machine's boot sequence.
articles.titleZh: Windows和Linux用户：更新安全启动密钥的截止日期即将到来
articles.contentZh: 您需要了解的有关保护机器启动顺序的密钥过期的信息。

articles.title: Midjourney Medical goes from generating ‘cat images’ to full-body ultrasound scans
articles.content: Midjourney CEO David Holz just showed off the company's first hardware product and plans to build a San Francisco spa, which he admitted is a bit different from the "cat pictures" produced by its AI image generator. Dubbed The Midjourney Scanner, it's an ultrasound-based full-body scanner that uses a ring of sensors to capture vertical […]
articles.titleZh: Midjourney Medical从生成“CAT图像”到全身超声扫描
articles.contentZh: Midjourney首席执行官David Holz刚刚展示了该公司的第一个硬件产品，并计划建造一个旧金山水疗中心，他承认这与其AI图像生成器生成的“猫图片”有点不同。被称为Midjourney扫描仪，它是一种基于超声波的全身扫描仪，使用一圈传感器来捕捉垂直[…]

articles.title: Tim Cook says RAM expenses are ‘unsustainable’ and Apple is going to raise prices
articles.content: Apple is planning to raise prices in response to the ongoing memory shortage. In an interview with The Wall Street Journal, Apple CEO Tim Cook says "price increases are unavoidable:" We're doing our best to mitigate the huge increases that are being passed to us, and we've been trying to shield our customers from the […]
articles.titleZh: 蒂姆·库克（ Tim Cook ）表示， RAM费用“不可持续” ，苹果将提高价格
articles.contentZh: 苹果计划提高价格，以应对持续的内存短缺。苹果首席执行官蒂姆·库克（ Tim Cook ）在接受《华尔街日报》采访时表示： “价格上涨是不可避免的：”我们正在尽最大努力缓解传递给我们的大幅上涨，我们一直在努力保护我们的客户免受[…]
